text: The other day, Tyler and I were digging deep in this mine having a competition to see who could find the biggest crystal And you won't believe what we found. As We dug deeper down into their earth We got in between This crevice which was A perfect place for little crystals to form Then we started pulling out chunks of Smoky Courts Which is good sign After finding a few small crystals It Was Tyler's turnin' In-the-hole And he managed To discover The Biggest Crystal Of The Day So Far He definitely Got Me Beat Now Tyler kept scraping Down On The Hole Right Behind Where He Found The Last Crystal And He Found Another One, Even Bigger It Turned Out To Be An Absolutely Gorgeous Smoky Amethyst Scepter I was Pretty jealous of this one but it's okay cause its my turn in the hole now Right Behind The Last Crystal There Was another one Sticking out and Its Just Getting Bigger & Bigger As I kept Digging After Chiseling Some More It Was Time to Pull It Out I Y'all I just popped it out Of The Hole Oh My God Look at This Size of That Thing We Sprayed Off some of that thick red clay And It Revealed The Gorgeous Amethyst Crystals Underneath Definitely Gonna Head Back To This Site Soon

segments.text: The other day, Tyler and I were digging deep in this mine having a competition to see who could find the biggest crystal
And you won't believe what we found.
As We dug deeper down into their earth
We got in between This crevice which was A perfect place for little crystals to form
Then we started pulling out chunks of Smoky Courts
Which is good sign
After finding a few small crystals
It Was Tyler's turnin' In-the-hole
And he managed To discover
The Biggest Crystal Of The Day So Far
He definitely Got Me Beat Now
Tyler kept scraping Down On The Hole
Right Behind Where He Found The Last Crystal
And He Found Another One, Even Bigger
It Turned Out To Be An Absolutely Gorgeous Smoky Amethyst Scepter
I was Pretty jealous of this one but it's okay cause its my turn in the hole now
Right Behind The Last Crystal There Was another one Sticking out
and Its Just Getting Bigger & Bigger As I kept Digging
After Chiseling Some More
It Was Time to Pull It Out
I Y'all
I just popped it out Of The Hole
Oh My God Look at This Size of That Thing
We Sprayed Off some of that thick red clay
And It Revealed The Gorgeous Amethyst Crystals Underneath
Definitely Gonna Head Back To This Site Soon
